title: botrychium ternatum
intro: Botrychium ternatum, also known as American ginseng fern or three-lobed grape fern, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant are primarily attributed to its ability to modulate the immune system and has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Botrychium ternatum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional medicine, typically in the form of decoctions or infusions, although modern research has been limited due to the plant's rarity and conservation status.
